capitalContribution.valueRequired: WELSH - Enter the total value of all monetary and non-monetary contributions
capitalContribution.twoDecimalPlaces: WELSH - Value must be a number with 2 decimal places
capitalContribution.moreThanZero: WELSH - Value must be 0.01 or more
capitalContribution.noSymbols: WELSH - Value must not include currency symbols like £, $ and €
capitalContribution.noComma: WELSH - Value must not include a comma
capitalContribution.atLeastOneType: WELSH - Select at least one type of contribution
capitalContribution.currencyRequired: WELSH - Select the currency of the capital contribution

choosePartnerType.generalPartner: WELSH - Select whether the general partner is a person or legal entity
choosePartnerType.limitedPartner: WELSH - Select whether the limited partner is a person or legal entity

chooseAddress.selectionRequired: WELSH - Select an address from the list

confirm.countryMissing: WELSH - We cannot identify the country for this address. Select Change, then select the country.

enterAddress.premisesMissing: WELSH - Enter a property name or number
enterAddress.premisesLength: WELSH - Property name or number must be 200 characters or less
enterAddress.premisesInvalid: WELSH - Property name or number must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
enterAddress.addressLine1Missing: WELSH - Enter address line 1, typically the building and street
enterAddress.addressLine1Invalid: WELSH - Address line 1 must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
enterAddress.addressLine1Length: WELSH - Address line 1 must be 50 characters or less
enterAddress.addressLine2Invalid: WELSH - Address line 2 must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
enterAddress.addressLine2Length: WELSH - Address line 2 must be 50 characters or less
enterAddress.localityMissing: WELSH - Enter a town or city
enterAddress.localityInvalid: WELSH - Town or city must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
enterAddress.localityLength: WELSH - Town or city must be 50 characters or less
enterAddress.regionInvalid: WELSH - County must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
enterAddress.regionLength: WELSH - County must be 50 characters or less
enterAddress.postcodeInvalid: WELSH - Postcode must only include letters a to z, numbers and spaces
enterAddress.postalCodeLength: WELSH - Postcode must be 20 characters or less
enterAddress.notMainland: WELSH - Enter a UK mainland postcode
enterAddress.jurisdictionCountry: WELSH - You must enter a country that matches your jurisdiction
enterAddress.jurisdictionEnglandAndWales: WELSH - You must enter a postcode which is in England or Wales
enterAddress.jurisdictionNorthernIreland: WELSH - You must enter a postcode which is in Northern Ireland
enterAddress.jurisdictionScotland: WELSH - You must enter a postcode which is in Scotland

postcodeLookup.premisesInvalid: WELSH - Property name or number must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes

postcodeLookup.postcodeInvalid: WELSH - Postcode must only include letters a to z, numbers and spaces

territoryChoice.noOptionSelectedEnd: WELSH - is in the UK or overseas

checkYourAnswers.lawfulPurposeRequired: WELSH - Confirm that the intended future activities are lawful

name.nameInvalid: WELSH - Limited partnership name must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
name.nameLength: WELSH - Partnership name (including name ending) must be 160 characters or less
